description: The 'Ndrina Dragone is a 'ndrina (clan) of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta, originating from Cutro, Italy. Founded by Antonio Dragone in the 1960s, it engaged in extortion, robbery, and murder. The clan was involved in a long-running feud with the Oliverio family and later with the Grande Aracri clan. It established operations in Emilia-Romagna, particularly in Reggio Emilia, Modena, and Piacenza. The clan's power declined after the killing of Antonio Dragone in 2004 and subsequent police operations.
